content:
- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md and .ralph/current_tasks_done.md, then inspected every active candidate task file for priority and blocked_by tags.
- Confirmed there are no active unblocked bug tasks; meta-task is not eligible because multiple unblocked failing normal tasks remain.
- Chose .ralph/tasks/story-tracing-based-logging/03-task-migrate-ha-dcs-pginfo-and-postgres-ingest-to-owned-typed-events.md as the next task because tracing story tasks 01 and 02 already pass, task 04 depends on task 03 conceptually, and continuing this architectural migration is the most logical next step before switching to unrelated docs or deployment work.

- Read .ralph/current_task.txt and found the active task path for story-tracing-based-logging task 03.
- Started reading the task markdown to understand current checkbox state and where to write the execution plan.
- Next I need to inspect the task file structure, then patch in a detailed plan ending with TO BE VERIFIED and stop.

- Read the task markdown and confirmed it is still not started with no execution plan written yet.
- Began targeted code reads for HA events/worker and DCS worker so the plan can name concrete emit sites, ownership shifts, and test updates.
- Next I need the same for PgInfo, postgres ingest, and the existing typed event contract modules before patching the task file.

- Confirmed Task 01/02 already established AppEvent, StructuredFields, decode_app_event, and raw-record builders.
- Read the remaining DCS/PgInfo/postgres-ingest files and saw concrete remaining BTreeMap emit sites that the plan needs to assign to typed helper modules or helper sections.
- Next I am comparing one completed migration pattern plus the prior task's written plan so the new plan follows the same house style and ownership model.

- Compared Task 02's completed plan format with current needs, so the new plan can fit the same structure and handoff style.
- I still need the exact postgres-ingest helper/test seams and the HA/DCS/PgInfo test assertion patterns before editing the task markdown.
- After that I will patch the task file with a detailed plan, end it with TO BE VERIFIED, and stop exactly there.

- Wrote the full implementation plan into the active Task 03 markdown under <implementation_plan>.
- The plan ends with TO BE VERIFIED exactly as requested, and I did not start the skeptical review or any code execution.
- Next engineer should read the task file, perform the required deep review that alters at least one thing, then replace TO BE VERIFIED with NOW EXECUTE only once satisfied.

- Read the active task markdown and confirmed it was in TO BE VERIFIED state from the prior pass.
- Performed a skeptical review against src/ha/events.rs, src/ha/worker.rs, src/dcs/worker.rs, src/pginfo/worker.rs, src/logging/postgres_ingest.rs, and supporting logging/apply files.
- Found a concrete plan gap: postgres_ingest raw-record parsing still uses ParsedLine { attributes: BTreeMap<String, Value> } plus StructuredFields::from_json_map, so the plan must explicitly migrate those parsed raw-record helpers to typed StructuredFields too before switching the task to NOW EXECUTE.

- Implemented typed AppEvent/StructuredFields migrations in HA, DCS, PgInfo, and postgres_ingest, plus initial test updates.
- Targeted compile surfaced a real mismatch for postgres.json that I fixed by teaching StructuredValue to accept serde_json::Value directly.
- Also discovered that parallel cargo test commands race on the shared target dir in this workspace, and the migration left EventMeta / LogHandle::emit_event / StructuredFields::from_json_map unused, so next I need to clean up those obsolete APIs and run builds sequentially.
